rubric.en:
**1** (3p): Program organization in 5 files (main.cpp, catalog.cpp, catalog.h, student.cpp, student.h)
**2** (5p): The two indexing operators in the Catalog class (indexing by index/number and by name/const char*)
**3** (3p): Operator += in Catalog class
**4** (1p): GetCount method in Catalog class
**5** (1p): Default constructor in Catalog class
**6** (2p): The two constructors in Student class
**7** (1p): GetName method in Student class
**8** (3p): PrintNote method in Student class
**9** (5p): Indexing operator in Student class
**10** (3p): Conversion to float operator in Student class
**11** (3p): Code compiles and runs correctly
rubric.ro:
**1** (3p): Organizarea programului în 5 fișiere (“main.cpp” , “catalog.cpp”, “catalog.h”, “student.cpp”, “student.h”)
**2** (5p): Cei doi operatorii de indexare din clasa Catalog (indexare prin numar (un int care reprezinta al n-lea student), sau prin nume (un const char * care reprezinta numele studentului)).
**3** (3p): Operatorul += din clasa Catalog
**4** (1p): Metoda GetCount din clasa Catalog
**5** (1p): Constructorul default din clasa Catalog
**6** (2p): Cei doi constructori din clasa Student
**7** (1p): Metoda GetName din clasa Student
**8** (3p): Metoda PrintNote din clasa Student
**9** (5p): Operatorul de indexare din clasa Student
**10** (3p): Operatorul de conversiela float din clasa Student
**11** (3p): Codul compilează și rulează corect
